name: codex-seo
description: Audit, fix, validate, and deploy SEO changes through a controlled local workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Controlled SEO audits and verified fixes
interface.longDescription: Audit projects, create Git safety snapshots, validate fixes in preview, compare reports, and prepare confirmed SSH/SFTP release deployments with automatic rollback.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project and fix the most important SEO issues.
Compare the latest SEO reports and explain regressions.
Validate these SEO fixes and prepare a safe release.
